NSCameraUsageDescription: The camera is used to scan QR codes for invite codes.
NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Your location is used to display nearby shops and map features.
NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Your location is used in the background to send reminders when you are near saved restaurants.
NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Your location is used in the background to send reminders when you are near saved restaurants.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Access to your photo library is needed to select a profile photo.
NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Access to your photo library is needed to save profile photos.
NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Tracking is used to personalize ads. You can still use the app without granting permission.
